data.body: 3b30 RED evidence: focused oracle collected and executed 3 tests; all 3 failed for intended missing behavior (resolve_analyzer returned None despite configured mapping; analyze_or_unavailable raised NotImplementedError on unconfigured Go; AnalyzerResult required unsupported fields instead of defaulting None). No import/collection failures. Gate command: pytest -q tests/unit/metrics/test_analyzer.py tests/unit/metrics/test_analyzer_heldout.py. Implementer tier decision: standard/mid (gpt-5.6-terra) because protocol + dispatch contract spans typing and fail-closed semantics; attempt count required.
